mapper.insert:
/* saveWmt10List */
insert into WTAKIT ( COMPKEY , TASKOKY , TASKOIT , TASKSTS , WAREKEY , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , LOTNMKY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , FRAREKY , FRZONKY , FRLOCKY , TOAREKY , TOZONKY , TOLOCKY , TOARQKY , TOZOQKY , TOLOQKY , FORDQTY , FUOMEKY , TCMPQTY , TUOMEKY , PRODDAT , SHELIFE , EXPIDAT , RCVDCDT , RCVFRDT , PARSNCD , PARSNNM , RCVDCKY , RCVDCIT , SHPDCKY , SHPDCIT , STORFKY , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER , POSTDAT, TRUNTYP , TRUNPID , STKSTAT )values ( #{userData.compkey} , #{taskoky} , #{taskoit} , #{tasksts} , #{warekey} , #{doccate} , #{doctype} , #{lotnmky} , #{ownerky} , #{skumkey} , #{skudesc} , #{areakey} , #{zonekey} , #{locakey} , #{toareky} , #{tozonky} , #{tolocky} , #{toareky} , #{tozonky} , #{tolocky} , #{fordqty} , #{suomkey} , 0 , #{suomkey} , replace(#{proddat}, '-', '') , #{shelife} , replace(#{expidat}, '-', '') , replace(#{rcvdcdt}, '-', '') , replace(#{rcvfrdt}, '-', '') , #{parsncd} , #{parsnnm} , #{rcvdcky} , #{rcvdcit} , #{shpdcky} , #{shpdcit} , #{stockky}, to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} , fn_wm_posdate(#{userData.compkey}, #{warekey}), #{truntyp}, #{trunpid}, #{stkstat} )
mapper.select: select ms.COMPKEY , ms.WAREKEY , ms.OWNERKY , ( select WHNAMLC from MWARMA mw where mw.COMPKEY = ms.COMPKEY and mw.WAREKEY = ms.WAREKEY ) as whnamlc , ( select OWNAMLC from MOWRMA mo where mo.COMPKEY = ms.COMPKEY and mo.OWNERKY = ms.OWNERKY ) as ownamlc , ms.SKUMKEY as combovl , ms.SKUDESC as combonm , IFNULL(sum(ws.STOTQTY), 0) as stotqty , ws.AREAKEY , ws.ZONEKEY , ws.LOCAKEY , ms.SUOMKEY , ws.LOTNMKY , ws.PRODDAT , ws.SHELIFE , ws.EXPIDAT , ws.RCVDCDT , ws.RCVFRDT , ws.RCVDCKY , ws.RCVDCIT , ws.SHPDCKY , ws.SHPDCIT , ws.STOCKKY from MSKUWC ms left join WSTKKY ws on ws.COMPKEY = ms.COMPKEY and ws.WAREKEY = ms.WAREKEY and ws.OWNERKY = ms.OWNERKY and ws.TRUNTYP = ms.TRUNTYP and ws.SUOMKEY = ms.SUOMKEY and ws.AREAKEY in ('STG', 'TAK') where ms.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and ms.SKUTYPE = 'SET' group by ms.COMPKEY , ms.WAREKEY , ms.OWNERKY , ms.SKUMKEY
mapper.insert: insert into WTAKIT ( COMPKEY , TASKOKY , TASKOIT , TASKSTS , WAREKEY , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , LOTNMKY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , TOAREKY , TOZONKY , TOLOCKY , FORDQTY , FUOMEKY , TCMPQTY , TUOMEKY , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER , POSTDAT )values ( #{userData.compkey} , #{taskoky} , fn_wm_taskoit(#{compkey} , #{taskoky}) , #{tasksts} , #{warekey} , #{doccate} , #{doctype} , #{lotnmky} , #{ownerky} , #{skumkey} , #{skudesc} , #{areakey} , #{zonekey} , #{locakey} , #{fordqty} , #{suomkey} , 0 , #{suomkey} , DATE_FORMAT(now() , '%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(now() , '%H%i%s') , #{userData.useract} , DATE_FORMAT(now() , '%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(now() , '%H%i%s') , #{userData.useract} , fn_wm_posdate(#{userData.compkey}, #{warekey}) )
mapper.select:
select concat(MST.COMPKEY , MST.WAREKEY , MST.OWNERKY , MST.SKUMKEY) as rowkey , MST.COMPKEY , MST.WAREKEY , MST.OWNERKY , MST.SKUMKEY , MST.SBSKUKY , MSK2.SKUDESC , MST.SBSTQTY , MST.UOMEKEY , IFNULL(TWT.STOTQTY , 0) as stotqty , IFNULL(SWT.STOTQTY, 0) AS ltotqty, DATE_FORMAT(MST.CREDATE , '%Y-%m-%d') as credate , DATE_FORMAT(MST.CREDATE , '%H:%i:%s') as cretime , MST.CREUSER , DATE_FORMAT(MST.LMODATE , '%Y-%m-%d') as lmodate , DATE_FORMAT(MST.LMODATE , '%H:%i:%s') as lmotime , MST.LMOUSER from MSKUST MST inner join MSKUWC MSK on MSK.COMPKEY = MST.COMPKEY and MSK.WAREKEY = MST.WAREKEY and MSK.OWNERKY = MST.OWNERKY and MSK.SKUMKEY = MST.SKUMKEY inner join MSKUWC MSK2 on MSK2.COMPKEY = MST.COMPKEY and MSK2.WAREKEY = MST.WAREKEY and MSK2.OWNERKY = MST.OWNERKY and MSK2.SKUMKEY = MST.SBSKUKY left outer join ( select COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY, SUM(STOTQTY) - SUM(SBLOQTY) AS STOTQTY from WSTKKY where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and WAREKEY = #{warekey} and OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and AREAKEY in ('STG' , 'TAK') and STOTQTY > 0 group by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY ) TWT on MST.COMPKEY = TWT.COMPKEY and MST.WAREKEY = TWT.WAREKEY and MST.OWNERKY = TWT.OWNERKY and MST.SBSKUKY = TWT.SKUMKEY left outer join ( select COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY, SUM(STOTQTY) - SUM(SBLOQTY) AS STOTQTY from WSTKKY where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and WAREKEY = #{warekey} and OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and AREAKEY = 'TAK' and ZONEKEY = 'SETZ' and STOTQTY > 0 group by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY ) SWT on MST.COMPKEY = SWT.COMPKEY and MST.WAREKEY = SWT.WAREKEY and MST.OWNERKY = SWT.OWNERKY and MST.SBSKUKY = SWT.SKUMKEY
MST.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and MST.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and MST.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and MST.SKUMKEY = #{skumkey}

CALL sp_wm_ctrstokky_adjset( #{userData.compkey}, #{warekey}, #{doccate} , #{doctype}, #{taskoky} , #{taskoit}, #{taskoky} , #{userData.useract} , #{omsgkey, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oresult, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} )
